title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Larsen & Toubro

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Larsen & Toubro
jsonLd.description:
Larsen & Toubro is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Larsen & Toubro:
Larsen & Toubro is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Larsen & Toubro!
